description: PRD-5 P4 创作模块 · 4 工具页(/generate · /boom-generate · /analysis · /video-analysis)+ /history 接入 · CopywritingAgent 解锁 free+boom mode + AnalysisAgent 全新建(2 mode viral/structural · lightweight tier) · 12 US · risk=high · 2 周

userStories.title: Foundation · TD-016 修 + 4 schema 重写 + ContextAssembler analysis 模板 + ToolForm/ToolResult 抽象
userStories.description:
PRD-5 协议锁前置 · 4 件事 · (1) 修 TD-016(copywriting.list agentId 大小写不一致 · 同步 7 router agentId 全用 Class name)· (2) 重写 4 schema(copywriting/videoAnalysis/boomGenerate 现是 PRD-2 mock 时期通用 schema · 不匹配真业务字段 · 重写 + 新建 analysis.schema.ts + constants.ts 含 HOT_ELEMENT_KEYS_22 / SCRIPT_TYPE_KEYS_20)· (3) ContextAssembler 加 templates/analysis.ts + index.ts 加 analysis 入口 · (4) 抽象 ToolForm + ToolResult wrapper(类似 StepForm/StepResult 但 LS namespace 不同 · 不强制 stepKey · 服务 4 工具页)。

[risk-upgrade] medium → foundation due to downstream=11 (US-002~012 全继承) + 关键词 'protocol/abstract/schema/shared'
acceptanceCriteria: packages/schemas/src/specialist-io/constants.ts 新建 · 导出 HOT_ELEMENT_KEYS_22 (22 项 · 4 组分类 · 心理唤起 4 + 社会心理 6 + 修辞结构 6 + 信息密度 6) + SCRIPT_TYPE_KEYS_20 (20 项 · tutorial/review/case_study/pov/monologue/debate/list_pop/before_after/street_interview/qa_short/reaction/mixcut/screen_record/animation/vlog/plot/voice_only/comparison/storytelling/duo_chat) as const · expect(HOT_ELEMENT_KEYS_22.length).toBe(22) 单测 PASS

packages/schemas/src/specialist-io/analysis.schema.ts 新建 · 导出 analysisStructuralInput (z.object({ copy: z.string().min(10).max(3000) })) + analysisViralInput (z.object({ lastTitle: z.string().max(200).optional(), lastCopy: z.string().min(10).max(3000) })) + analysisStructuralOutput (z.object({ scores: { hook/structure/emotion/specificity/cta/overall: z.number().int().min(0).max(100) }, optimizations: z.array(z.object({ dimension, issue, suggestion })).min(3).max(5), rewriteSnippet: z.string().min(50).max(200) })) + analysisViralOutput (z.object({ analysis: { elements, structure, hookType, viralFormula }, insights: array.min(3), rewriteVersion: z.string().min(50) }))

packages/schemas/src/specialist-io/copywriting.schema.ts 重写 · 保留 PRD-4 step7 schema (backward compat) · 新加 copywritingFreeGenerateInput (z.object({ scriptType: z.enum(SCRIPT_TYPE_KEYS_20), elements: z.array(z.enum(HOT_ELEMENT_KEYS_22)).min(1).max(8), topic: z.string().min(1).max(500) })) + copywritingFreeOutput (z.object({ markdown: z.string().min(400).max(1500), metadata: { scriptType, elements, structureSummary, estimatedDuration } }))

packages/schemas/src/specialist-io/boomGenerate.schema.ts 重写 · 删除 stepKey-based · 改 generateBoomInput (z.object({ elements: z.array(z.enum(HOT_ELEMENT_KEYS_22)).min(1).max(8), industry: z.string().max(64).optional(), theme: z.string().max(200).optional() })) + boomOutput (z.object({ candidates: z.array(z.string().min(200).max(500)).length(5), metadata: { count: z.literal(5), elements } }))
packages/schemas/src/specialist-io/videoAnalysis.schema.ts 重写 · 删除 URL-based · 改 analyzeVideoInput (z.object({ lastTitle: z.string().max(200).optional(), lastCopy: z.string().min(10).max(3000) }))
packages/schemas/src/specialist-io/index.ts 加 analysis + constants barrel export
apps/api/src/services/context-assembler/templates/analysis.ts 新建 · persona = "你是文案分析师" + methodology = "22 元素心理学 + 67 RAG 案例对照"(PROMPTS.md §9.1 复制 · ~10 行)
apps/api/src/services/context-assembler/templates/index.ts SPECIALIST_TEMPLATES 加 analysis: analysisTemplate 入口
apps/web/src/components/ToolForm/ToolForm.tsx 新建(~600 行 · useForm + zodResolver + LS-first dual-write + AbortController on unmount · LS namespace getToolLsKey + accept defaultValues prop · D-030/031)
apps/web/src/components/ToolForm/ScriptTypeSelect.tsx (20 脚本类型 dropdown + ScrollArea h-72 · AGENTS §11.4 + §11.6.7 模式)
apps/web/src/components/ToolForm/ElementsMultiSelect.tsx (22 爆款元素 4 组分类 + checkbox + ScrollArea h-96 · 4 组 collapsible)
apps/web/src/components/ToolResult/ToolResult.tsx (~80 行 · switch by toolKey · 4 子组件 FreeGenerateResult / BoomGenerateResult / AnalysisResult / VideoAnalysisResult)
apps/web/src/components/ToolResult/{Free,Boom}GenerateResult.tsx + {Analysis,VideoAnalysis}Result.tsx 新建(各 60-100 行)
apps/web/src/lib/ls-namespace.ts 加 export getToolLsKey(accountId, toolKey, suffix) → "aiip_memory_acc_${accountId}_tool_${toolKey}_${suffix}"(D-031)

apps/api/src/trpc/routers/copywriting.ts line 106 修 where: { agentId: 'CopywritingAgent' }(大写 Class name 规范 · TD-016)+ 7 router(stepData/monetization/videoProduction/boomGenerate/copywriting/videoAnalysis/privateDomain)agentId 写入大小写规范统一(全 Class name 大写)
audit grep · `grep -E "agentId: '[a-z]" apps/api/src/trpc/routers/` 应 0 命中(全大写 Class name)
audit grep · grep packages/schemas import 应 0 命中(D-033 · packages/schemas 不 import apps/api)
tests/unit/schemas/specialist-io.test.ts ≥ 8 zod 验证(analysis viral/structural input + output + constants 长度 22/20)
tests/unit/web/ToolForm.test.tsx ≥ 8 unit(useForm + zodResolver + LS dual-write + AbortController + defaultValues 预填)
tests/unit/web/ToolResult.test.tsx ≥ 4 unit(switch by toolKey 4 case)
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.test_command: pnpm test tests/unit/schemas/specialist-io.test.ts tests/unit/web/ToolForm.test.tsx tests/unit/web/ToolResult.test.tsx && pnpm typecheck

anti_patterns.source_story: REJ-008 (RLS · 重写 schema 必带 accountId)
anti_patterns.lesson: prisma 查询不带 account_id WHERE → 跨账号污染
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ prisma.history.findMany() 不带 where: { accountId }
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ 走 protectedProcedure 自动注入 RLS context · 或显式 where: { accountId: ctx.activeAccountId! }

anti_patterns.lesson: tRPC procedure 不经 accountIsolation middleware
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ analysis/history router 用 publicProcedure · 不验证用户实际所属
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ 必用 protectedProcedure · accountIsolationMiddleware 自动 set_config + RLS

anti_patterns.lesson: LS-first dual-write · DB 写失败时 LS 不回滚 + toast 提示(防数据丢)
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ LS 写后 DB 失败时回滚 LS · 用户输入丢失
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ LS 先写 + DB 后写 · DB fail 时 LS 保留 + toast.error · 用户可重试

userStories.title: Foundation · CopywritingAgent 解锁 free+boom + AnalysisAgent 新建
userStories.description:
解锁 CopywritingAgent free + boom mode(currently throw 'Not implemented · PRD-5')+ 全新 AnalysisAgent(2 mode viral/structural · model_tier='lightweight' · 不需 reasoning)。CopywritingAgent · outputSchema getter 4 mode 全 cover(step7 ✓ / free 新加 / boom 新加 / acquisition 改 throw 'PRD-6')· invokeLLM 分支 free/boom 各 SSE stream(继承 PRD-4 US-007 _consumeStream 模式)· fallbackTemplate 加 free/boom 兜底。AnalysisAgent · 继承 BaseSpecialist · 单实例 export · 2 mode 用 _mode + outputSchema getter(D-028)· non-SSE(短输出)· timeout_ms=30000。

[risk-upgrade] high → foundation due to downstream=8 (US-003/004/005/006/007/008/009/010 全继承) + 关键词 'protocol/specialist/multi-mode'
acceptanceCriteria: apps/api/src/specialists/AnalysisAgent.ts 新建(~250 行) · 继承 BaseSpecialist · type AnalysisMode = "viral" | "structural" · private _mode · 五层配置(model_tier="lightweight" · timeout_ms=30000 · streaming=false) · l2_read=["stepData"] · l2_write=["history"] · knowledge.constants=["hotElements"] · 单例 export analysisAgent
AnalysisAgent inputSchema getter 按 _mode 返回 analysisViralInput | analysisStructuralInput
AnalysisAgent outputSchema getter 按 _mode 返回 analysisViralOutput | analysisStructuralOutput · throw "Unknown mode" 兜底(防漏 case)

AnalysisAgent invokeLLM 设 _mode (this._mode = (this.req.mode ?? "viral") as AnalysisMode) → 调 LLMGateway.complete(non-SSE · responseFormat: this.outputSchema · model_tier: "lightweight" · timeout_ms: 30000)
AnalysisAgent static readonly fallbackTemplate Record<AnalysisMode, unknown>(viral / structural 各兜底 · 满足 schema min 约束 · 中文字符 .repeat(N) 才能稳定 ≥ 阈值)

CopywritingAgent line 107-108 outputSchema getter 改 4 mode 全 cover · if step7 → CopywritingStep7Output / if free → copywritingFreeOutput / if boom → boomOutput / if acquisition → throw "Not implemented · PRD-6"(D-035 · 从 PRD-5 改 PRD-6)/ throw "Unknown mode" 兜底

CopywritingAgent invokeLLM 加 free / boom mode 分支 · SSE stream + _consumeStream 复用 step7 模式 · stream.meta.model 接收真 model · cost_log.modelUsed 反映(D-019 · grep `'claude-[0-9]\|gpt-[0-9]'` 在 CopywritingAgent.ts 应 0 命中)
CopywritingAgent fallbackTemplate 加 free / boom mode 兜底(满足 copywritingFreeOutput.markdown.min(400) + boomOutput.candidates.length(5) 约束)
audit grep · `grep 'Not implemented · PRD-5' apps/api/src/specialists/CopywritingAgent.ts` 应 0 命中(全替换为 'PRD-6' · D-035)
audit grep · `grep -E "stream.meta.model|streamChunk.meta" apps/api/src/specialists/CopywritingAgent.ts` 应 ≥ 2 命中(free + boom 都用 meta chunk · D-019)
audit grep · `grep 'export const analysisAgent\b' apps/api/src/specialists/AnalysisAgent.ts` 应 1 命中(单实例 · REJ-004)
apps/api/src/services/context-assembler/templates/copywriting.ts 扩 4 mode persona + methodology 段(从 PROMPTS.md §5.1 + §5.3-§5.5 复制 · 现仅 step7 · 加 free/boom)
apps/api/src/services/context-assembler/templates/analysis.ts 完善 viral/structural 模板内容(PROMPTS.md §9.1 + §9.2 + §9.3 复制)
tests/unit/specialists/__tests__/AnalysisAgent.test.ts ≥ 8 unit · 2 mode × 4 场景(happy / fallback / cold-start / config 验证) · vi.hoisted 解决 mock factory hoisting
tests/unit/specialists/__tests__/CopywritingAgent.test.ts 加 free/boom 各 4 场景 = 8 新 tests(原 9 → 17 tests)
反例 grep · `grep -rn "@anthropic-ai/sdk\|openai" apps/api/src/specialists/{Copywriting,Analysis}Agent.ts` 应 0 命中(REJ-001)
反例 grep · `grep -rEn "for.*invokeLLM|while.*invokeLLM" apps/api/src/specialists/{Copywriting,Analysis}Agent.ts` 应 0 命中(REJ-002)
TD-014 文档化 · audit notes 写 "Multi-mode Specialist · _mode race window · P3 单 user 串行安全 · 高并发治理留 PRD-7+"(AGENTS §11.6.3 · 5 处复用)
AnalysisAgent execute · structural mode < 5s(lightweight · short output) · viral mode < 8s · CopywritingAgent free mode < 30s · boom mode < 45s
mock 测试 100 次 < 2s(无 LLM · 单元 fast)
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

anti_patterns.lesson: Specialist execute() 不允许直接调 anthropic / openai SDK
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk' 直接在 Specialist.ts 内
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ 通过 this.llmGateway · grep '@anthropic-ai/sdk\|openai' 在 specialists/ 0 命中

anti_patterns.lesson: Specialist execute() 必须是单次 LLM 调用 · 不允许 while/for 循环
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ async execute(req) { for (const x of items) { await this.llmGateway.complete(...) } } — 这是伪 Agent
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ Specialist 是 95% Workflow · 单次 LLM 调用 · 多轮 Agent 必须独立成 L5

anti_patterns.source_story: REJ-003-D019 (model 硬编码 + stream meta chunk)
anti_patterns.lesson: Specialist 不硬编码 model 名(D-019 · cost_log.modelUsed 反映 LLMGateway 真选 model)
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ const model = 'claude-sonnet-4-6'; this.llmGateway.complete({ model });
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ this.llmGateway.complete({ model_tier: 'lightweight'|'reasoning' }) · LLMGateway 决定 · SSE 用 stream meta chunk 接收真 model

anti_patterns.lesson: 同一 Specialist 多 mode 不能共用一个输出 zod schema
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ outputSchema 是固定不变 · 不区分 mode
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ outputSchema 用 getter · 按 this._mode 返回对应 schema

anti_patterns.lesson: Multi-mode Specialist _mode + outputSchema getter race window 警示(PRD-4 衍生 · AGENTS §11.6.3)
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ 不文档化 race window · 高并发场景未来撞 race
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ AGENTS §11.6.3 文档化 · P3 单 user 串行安全 · 高并发治理留 PRD-7+

userStories.title: /generate 后端 · copywriting.freeGenerate procedure 真接 CopywritingAgent free mode
userStories.description: 在 apps/api/src/trpc/routers/copywriting.ts 新增 freeGenerate procedure(D-026 选项 B · 不动 generate)· 调 copywritingAgent.execute({ accountId, mode: 'free', userInput }) · 写 history 表(agentId='CopywritingAgent' · agentMode='free' · contentType='markdown' · scriptType + elements 填全 · isFallback / tokensUsed / modelUsed / durationMs / traceId 全填) · 返回 history row。
acceptanceCriteria: apps/api/src/trpc/routers/copywriting.ts 加 freeGenerate procedure(protectedProcedure · input copywritingFreeGenerateInput · 调 copywritingAgent.execute({ accountId: activeAccountId!, mode: 'free', userInput: input, traceId }))

history.create 写完整字段 · accountId / agentId='CopywritingAgent' / agentMode='free' / sourceType='user' / inputSummary=input.topic.substring(0,100) / content=agentRes.result.markdown / contentType='markdown' / scriptType=input.scriptType / elements=input.elements / isFallback=agentRes.isFallback / tokensUsed / modelUsed / durationMs / traceId
不动 PRD-4 既有 generate procedure(D-026 选项 B · 兼容 stepData router 调用)
tests/integration/api/copywriting-free-llm.test.ts 1 integration · nock SDK + 真 DB cost_log 查 SQL + history 写入完整字段验证
tests/unit/api/copywriting-router.test.ts 4 unit · freeGenerate happy + zod fail empty topic + Specialist throw → fallback path + agentMode="free" 字段填充
zod input fail(elements 空 / scriptType 不在 enum / topic > 500)→ TRPCError BAD_REQUEST
copywritingAgent.execute throw SchemaValidationError → fallback 路径(BaseSpecialist 内 catch · agentRes.isFallback=true · markdown=fallbackTemplate.free)
cost_log 写入由 BaseSpecialist 自动(eventType="specialist_call" · target.agentMode="free")
`copywriting.freeGenerate` mutation 服务端 < 60s P95 < 45s · history.create < 50ms
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

anti_patterns.lesson: prisma 查询不带 account_id WHERE → 跨账号污染
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ prisma.history.findMany() 不带 where: { accountId }
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ 走 protectedProcedure 自动注入 RLS context · 或显式 where: { accountId: ctx.activeAccountId! }

anti_patterns.lesson: tRPC procedure 不经 accountIsolation middleware
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ analysis/history router 用 publicProcedure · 不验证用户实际所属
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ 必用 protectedProcedure · accountIsolationMiddleware 自动 set_config + RLS

anti_patterns.lesson: history.create / cost_log.create 不带 trace_id
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ await prisma.history.create({ data: { ... } }) 没填 traceId
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ traceId: traceId ?? null · 全链路追踪 · TraceId 用 generateSpecialistTraceId(REJ-017)

anti_patterns.lesson: Specialist 必须设 timeout · 不让 LLM 卡死任意时间
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ this.llmGateway.complete({ ... }) 不传 timeout_ms
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ 必传 timeout_ms = this.config.execution.timeout_ms(30000-60000)

userStories.title: /generate 前端 · Generate.tsx 真表单 + ToolForm 复用
userStories.description: 替换 apps/web/src/pages/tools/Generate.tsx PRD-3 占位 · 真表单(<ToolForm toolKey='freeGenerate' schema={copywritingFreeGenerateInput}> + ScriptTypeSelect 20 + ElementsMultiSelect 22 + topic textarea max 500) · submit 调 trpc.copywriting.freeGenerate.useMutation · onSuccess → setResult → <ToolResult toolKey='freeGenerate' data={result} isFallback={result.isFallback}/>(react-markdown + remark-gfm) · LS namespace acc_{id}_tool_freeGenerate_input(D-031) · LS-first dual-write(REJ-035) · AbortController on unmount。
acceptanceCriteria: apps/web/src/pages/tools/Generate.tsx 替换 PRD-3 占位 · 真表单 ToolForm + 3 子字段(ScriptTypeSelect + ElementsMultiSelect + TextareaField topic)
submit → trpc.copywriting.freeGenerate.mutate(input) · onSuccess setResult · onError toast.error("生成失败 · 请稍后重试")
LS namespace getToolLsKey(accountId, "freeGenerate", "input") → "aiip_memory_acc_{id}_tool_freeGenerate_input"
加 useEffect(?historyId) 读 trpc.history.detail.useQuery({ id }) → 预填 ToolForm.defaultValues(US-011 接入预填)
<ToolResult toolKey="freeGenerate" data={result} isFallback={result.isFallback}/> 渲染 markdown 长文(react-markdown + remark-gfm) · 同 Step7Result 模式(AGENTS §11.6.4)
tests/unit/web/pages/Generate.test.tsx ≥ 5 unit(表单 render + zod 校验 Chinese error + mutation success + mutation error toast + LS 预填)
tests/e2e/tool-generate.spec.ts 1 e2e · CI mock LLM · 流程 · 创建账号 → 跳 /generate → 选 scriptType + elements + topic → submit → 看结果出现 + isFallback=false + 无控制台错误
AbortController on unmount(组件卸载时取消 in-flight mutation · 防 race · 同 StepForm 模式)
LD-015 0 hardcode color · grep `#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}` 在 Generate.tsx 应 0 命中
FeedbackButton 已 PRD-4 US-014 落地 · 本 US 复用(content 渲染区下方)
Generate.tsx initial render < 100ms · ScriptTypeSelect dropdown open < 50ms · ElementsMultiSelect 滚动流畅 60fps
使用 agent-browser 在浏览器中验证 · 打开 /generate · 选 scriptType=tutorial + elements=[fear, social_proof] + topic="为什么有的人 30 岁就财富自由" · 点"生成文案" · 看到 markdown 长文 + 字数统计 + 无控制台错误
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

anti_patterns.lesson: tRPC procedure 不经 accountIsolation middleware
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ analysis/history router 用 publicProcedure · 不验证用户实际所属
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ 必用 protectedProcedure · accountIsolationMiddleware 自动 set_config + RLS

anti_patterns.lesson: prisma 查询不带 account_id WHERE → 跨账号污染
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ prisma.history.findMany() 不带 where: { accountId }
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ 走 protectedProcedure 自动注入 RLS context · 或显式 where: { accountId: ctx.activeAccountId! }

anti_patterns.lesson: 同一 Specialist 多 mode 不能共用一个输出 zod schema
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ outputSchema 是固定不变 · 不区分 mode
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ outputSchema 用 getter · 按 this._mode 返回对应 schema

anti_patterns.lesson: Multi-mode Specialist _mode + outputSchema getter race window 警示(PRD-4 衍生 · AGENTS §11.6.3)
anti_patterns.antipattern: ❌ 不文档化 race window · 高并发场景未来撞 race
anti_patterns.correct: ✅ AGENTS §11.6.3 文档化 · P3 单 user 串行安全 · 高并发治理留 PRD-7+
